tasks.test:coverage: deno test --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env --coverage=.coverage src/ mod_test.ts && deno coverage .coverage
tasks.check: deno check mod.ts examples/minimal.ts examples/report-pipeline.ts mod_test.ts
tasks.prerelease:
printf '
📦 Pre-release workflow:
  1. Bump version in deno.json to X.Y.Z-alpha.N
  2. Run: deno task test
  3. Run: npx jsr publish
  4. Install in hosts: deno add @sarkarshubhdeep/jerry-lib@X.Y.Z-alpha.N

See PUBLISH.md for details.

'
